title: Cape on elytra
body:
**This resource pack will make your elytra look like with cape by renaming it! This pack currently has all cape-elytra. Renamed elytra will display a small image on item texture which means that it has been renamed and show which texture is applied to it.**
_________________________________________

**All name of texture:**   
_birthday   
cherry_blossom   
cobalt    
db   
migrator   
millionth_customer   
minecon2011

vanilla_
